heading: Protection of national security information and other information
label: 3355c Protection of national security information and other information
notes: CodificationSection was formerly set out in a note under .section 3161 of this title

L. 117–263section 3024(i) of this title2007—Subsec. (c). substituted “Director of National Intelligence” for “Director of Central Intelligence” in heading and text.Pub. L. 110–53

L. 117–263section 3024(i) of this title2007—Subsec. (c). substituted “Director of National Intelligence” for “Director of Central Intelligence” in heading and text.Pub. L. 110–53

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to limit the authority of the head of an agency to classify information or to continue the classification of information previously classified by that agency.

children.heading: Special access programs
children.label: b Special access programs
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to limit the authority of the head of an agency to grant or deny access to a special access program.

children.heading: Authorities of Director of National Intelligence
children.label: c Authorities of Director of National Intelligence
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to limit the authorities of the Director of National Intelligence as the head of the intelligence community, including the Director’s responsibility to protect intelligence sources and methods from unauthorized disclosure as required by 3024(h) of this title.1So in original. Probably should be preceded by “section”.1

children.heading: Exemptions to release of information
children.label: d Exemptions to release of information
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to limit any exemption or exception to the release to the public under this subchapter of information that is protected under subsection (b) of (commonly referred to as the “Freedom of Information Act”), or (commonly referred to as the “Privacy Act”).section 552 of title 5section 552a of title 5

children.heading: Withholding information from Congress
children.label: e Withholding information from Congress
children.text: Nothing in this subchaper shall be construed to authorize the withholding of information from Congress.
